name: TimelineEvent
description: Business object representing a single event in the Timeline widget

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title or main text for the timeline event

properties.name: description
properties.description: Optional detailed description of the event

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Date/time of the event as Date object

properties.name: status
properties.description: Event status: completed, current, pending, error, warning

properties.name: icon
properties.description: Optional icon identifier or class name
